recommendations.title: The Crimes That Bind
recommendations.overview: When her son is accused of raping and trying to murder his ex-wife, Alicia embarks on a journey that will change her life forever.

recommendations.title: Nine Days
recommendations.overview: A bureaucrat interviews five souls to decide which of them will be given a life on Earth. But he soon faces an existential challenge of his own.

recommendations.title: Irresistible
recommendations.overview: A wife and mother is consumed by the thought that her husband's co-worker is trying to win him away from her and their family.

recommendations.title: House of Spoils
recommendations.overview: An ambitious chef opens a restaurant on a remote estate where she battles kitchen chaos, crushing self doubts… and a haunting presence who threatens to sabotage her at every turn.

recommendations.title: Midnight Lace
recommendations.overview: Kit Preston begins to unravel when she receives threatening telephone calls informing her she's soon to be murdered.

recommendations.title: Shimmer Lake
recommendations.overview: Shot in reverse day-by-day through a week—a local sheriff embarks on a quest to unlock the mystery of three small-town criminals and a bank heist gone wrong.

recommendations.title: The Interview
recommendations.overview: A duel between a suspected murderer and a detective pressed by people who want results. But whose skin is really wanted?

recommendations.title: Locke
recommendations.overview: Ivan Locke has worked hard to craft a good life for himself. Tonight, that life will collapse around him. On the eve of the biggest challenge of his career, Ivan receives a phone call that sets in motion a series of events that will unravel his famil

recommendations.title: Boston Strangler
recommendations.overview: Reporters Loretta McLaughlin and Jean Cole bravely pursue the story of the Boston Strangler at great personal risk, putting their own lives on the line in their quest to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: They Look Like People
recommendations.overview: Suspecting that people are transforming into malevolent shape-shifters, Wyatt flees to New York City to seek out his estranged childhood friend Christian.
